title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind is exploring AI-enhanced mouse pointer functionality that contextually understands what content the pointer targets and determines its relevance to the user. The project reimagines a fifty-year-old interface element with modern AI capabilities.
